error_signature: must contain a binary file 'data', but none was found [item 0]
title: Missing binary file 'data' in Mistral Upload Node
symptom: When attempting to upload multiple PDFs, the workflow throws an error stating 'must contain a binary file 'data', but none was found [item 0]'. This occurs specifically when reaching the Mistral Upload Node.
not_this_if: Only one PDF is uploaded successfully
root_cause: The Mistral Upload Node requires the input data to include a binary file named 'data'. When multiple files are uploaded, the workflow may not be correctly structured to provide this binary data, leading to the error.
fix_steps: Ensure that the binary files are correctly split and mapped in the workflow.
Check the input data field settings in the Mistral Upload Node to confirm it is set to receive the binary data.
agent_instruction: Verify the binary file mapping in the Mistral Upload Node and ensure it receives the correct input data.
